18.sourceTitle: Wolf Tooth Tubeless Valve Stem Kit for Clik Valve - Amazon.com
18.evidenceText: Wolf Tooth Tubeless Valve Stem Kit for Clik Valve - Utilizes Clik Valves for best-in-class performance
18.extractionRationale: One distinct third-party accessory product identified: Wolf Tooth Tubeless Valve Stem Kit specifically designed for Clik Valve. Color variants do not constitute separate products. Only one source provided limits comprehensive count.

20.sourceTitle: BBB CoreCap Valve Caps Blue (2 pcs) | eBay
20.evidenceText: BBB CoreCap Valve Caps Blue (2 pcs) | eBay - Highly durable yet smart design that eliminates the valve core for easy use. Compatible with all Presta valves with removable valve cores.
20.extractionRationale: One distinct eBay listing URL found that explicitly mentions the CoreCap valve product in its title and describes compatible valve cores.

45.evidenceText: The DT Swiss tubeless valve perfectly matches DT Swiss rims - indicating proprietary valve systems. Hunt and other brands similarly do not mention Clik adoption in provided sources.
45.extractionRationale: No evidence in any of the three sources mentions Clik valve adoption by DT Swiss, Mavic, Hunt, Zipp, ENVE, or Roval. DT Swiss explicitly uses their own proprietary valve system. Therefore, 0% of major brands have converted to Clik valve.

57.evidenceText: Product listings for BBB Cycling CoreCap products (BTI-165 and BTI-166 variants) on BIKE24 show only product information without stock status or restock dates.
57.extractionRationale: None of the three sources contain explicit stock availability information, 'back in stock' language with dates, or any restock turnaround time data. The sources show only product descriptions and features from BIKE24 product pages without inventory status indicators needed to calculate restock turnaround time.
